business_name.intro: Kindly provide the following for your Business Name registration:

sections.title: Business Information
items: Valid ID (NIN Slip, Voter's Card, National ID, Driver's License or International Passport)

ltd.intro: Kindly provide the following for your Limited Company Registration:

sections.title: Company Information
items: Proposed Company Name(s) — minimum 2 to 3 options

sections.title: Additional Requirements
items: Valid ID for all directors (National ID, NIN Slip, Voter's Card, Driver's License or International Passport)
Witness Details: Full Name, Phone, Occupation, Address, Signature and NIN
Active company email address and phone number

ngo.intro: Kindly provide the following for your NGO / Incorporated Trustee Registration:

sections.title: Organization Information
items: Proposed Name Options (2 options in order of preference)
Aims and Objectives of the Organization

sections.title: Trustees' Information (minimum 2 trustees, for each trustee)
Supporting Documents
items: Minutes of Meeting showing appointment of trustees
